source: valorant.fandom.com + playvalorant.com + dexerto.com + dotesports.com + bo3.gg + turbosmurfs.gg + earlygame.com + thespike.gg + pcgamesn.com + beebom.com
notes: Valorant is exclusively on the Riot launcher (no Steam, no Epic). VP (Valorant Points) are purchased through the Riot client. Riot did a regional price update on 18 September 2024 following a 3 September 2024 announcement. US pricing remained stable but many other regions saw increases. Valorant is known industry-wide for having some of the most expensive skins in F2P gaming.

tiers.bonus_note: 50 bonus VP vs buying 2x475 (950 VP for $9.98)
1500 bonus VP - best value tier, 13.6% more VP per dollar vs smallest pack

discount_progression.note: Higher tiers give progressively better value per VP

gbp_united_kingdom.note: UK uses slightly different VP amounts per tier compared to US/EU. Confirmed range is 500 VP at GBP 4.50 to 9450 VP at GBP 90. Full intermediate tier breakdown not confirmed via web search.

sek_sweden.note: Specific SEK pricing not found. Sweden falls under EU region. Likely priced in EUR or SEK equivalent. Norway confirmed to have seen a ~12% price increase in the Sept 2024 update.
sek_sweden.estimated_note: At current FX (~10.5 SEK/EUR), 475 VP would be approximately 52 SEK.

regional_pricing.regional_update_note: On 3 September 2024, Riot announced regional price changes effective 18 September 2024. Reasons cited: global economy changes, exchange rate fluctuations, and VPN/server-transfer arbitrage exploitation. Turkey, Brazil, and Vietnam remain among the cheapest regions globally.

skin_pricing_by_tier.note: Valorant skins are organised into 5 edition tiers. Higher tiers include more elaborate VFX, animations, sound effects, and finishers. All skins are purely cosmetic.
skin_pricing_by_tier.source: dexerto.com, valorant.fandom.com, thespike.gg, pcgamesn.com, beebom.com, gametyrant.com

tiers.features: New model + custom ADS reticle, some have VFX
New model + VFX + audio + finisher + variants. Upgradeable with Radianite.
Full premium treatment + unique thematic elements. Upgradeable.
Top-tier everything. Custom animations, evolving/reactive elements, premium finishers.

radianite_system.note: Radianite Points are a secondary currency used to unlock skin upgrades (VFX, audio, animations, finishers, colour variants) on Premium tier and above skins. Cannot be purchased directly with real money - only obtainable through Battle Pass.

example_full_upgrade.note: Requires purchasing and completing Battle Pass to earn enough Radianite

radianite_system.radianite_from_battle_pass: Primary source. Free and premium tracks award Radianite.

battle_pass.includes: Premium track with 3 skin collections (2 Select + 1 Deluxe), Radianite, accessories

notable_bundles.name: Champions 2025 Bundle
notable_bundles.note: Annual esports celebration bundle with unique Champions Vandal skin

economy_notes: Pure cosmetic - absolutely no gameplay advantage from purchases
Valorant is widely regarded as one of the most expensive F2P games for skins
A single Premium-tier gun skin costs ~$19, roughly the price of an indie game
Ultra Edition bundles can exceed $100 for a set of weapon skins
Full skin upgrade (purchase + Radianite) can cost $60+ for a single weapon
VP and Radianite are two separate currencies - VP for buying, Radianite for upgrading
Riot's pricing strategy is deliberate: high prices maintain perceived exclusivity and prestige
Night Market offers random discounts on skins periodically - creates engagement spikes
Battle Pass at 1000 VP ($10) is the main value entry point
No trading system - all purchases are final and account-bound
Regional pricing varies significantly - Brazil/Turkey/Vietnam are cheapest markets
September 2024 regional price update increased costs in many markets outside US
